pageDescription: I build distributed systems, financial infrastructure, and AI-driven data platforms that operate under real-world constraints and high-volume workloads.
aboutSectionSubtitle: Background, experience, and the systems I focus on building.
headline: Designing systems that handle financial transactions, data pipelines, and AI workloads at scale
summary: Senior software engineer with 8+ years of experience building distributed systems, financial infrastructure, and AI-driven data platforms. My work centers on designing backend systems that process high-volume transactions, power data pipelines, and support real-world financial operations at scale.
body: In my current role, I build and scale systems for a nonprofit-focused financial platform supporting ~1000 organizations and over $1B in annual donation volume. This includes payment infrastructure, data ingestion and ETL pipelines, and AI-powered analytics systems designed for secure, multi-tenant environments.

I focus on systems that need to be reliable, scalable, and maintainable over time—whether it's high-throughput payment processing, large-scale data migration, or building guardrails for AI-driven data access. My approach balances system design, performance, and practical product needs in production environments.
experienceSubtitle: Roles focused on distributed systems, financial infrastructure, and scalable platforms.
educationSubtitle: Academic foundation in computer science and systems design.
